label: mixed
title: Swap password reset API call and refresh the forgot-password page state
body:
# Swap password reset API call

Point the forgot-password flow at `/api/v2/password-reset`, and refresh the `/forgot-password` page banner on success.

## Acceptance Criteria

- [ ] AC-1: Backend: `/api/v2/password-reset` responds with the v2 envelope under load.
- [ ] AC-2: Frontend: visiting `/forgot-password` and submitting the form shows the new success banner within 1500 ms.
- [ ] AC-3: Screenshot evidence captured 2 s after submission.
